page_metadata.biotools__summary: aWCluster is a network-based integration method of multiomics data as well as a clustering technique founded on the Wasserstein (Earth Mover's) distance from the theory of optimal mass transport.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: aWCluster is a network-based integration method of multiomics data as well as a clustering technique founded on the Wasserstein (Earth Mover's) distance from the theory of optimal mass transport.
